###############################################################################
#  KEYBINDINGS — ohmychadwm (QWERTY)
#  Source: etc/skel/.config/ohmychadwm/chadwm/config.def.h (QWERTY) + etc/skel/.config/ohmychadwm/sxhkd/sxhkdrc
#  Generated: 2026.06.30 by /kiro-keybindings-all — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND
###############################################################################

── 1. Applications & Launchers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + Return          alacritty (terminal)
  super + t               alacritty (terminal)
  super + KP_Enter        alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + Return     alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + t          alacritty (terminal)
  F12                     alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + End        alacritty -e btop (system monitor)
  super + shift + Return  thunar (file manager)
  super + shift + KP_Enter  thunar (file manager)
  super + space           rofi drun (app launcher, fullscreen)
  super + r               rofi drun (app launcher)
  super + d               rofi drun (app launcher, large)
  super + shift + d       dmenu_run (app launcher)
  alt + r                 rofi-theme-selector
  super + e               code (editor)
  super + F1              vivaldi-stable (browser)
  super + F2              code (editor)
  super + F3              inkscape
  super + F4              gimp
  super + F5              meld
  super + F6              vlc
  super + F7              virtualbox
  super + F8              thunar (file manager)
  super + F9              virt-manager
  super + F10             spotify
  super + F11             rofi drun (app launcher, fullscreen)
  super + F12             rofi drun (app launcher)
  ctrl + alt + v          vivaldi-stable (browser)
  ctrl + alt + f          firefox (browser)
  ctrl + alt + b          brave (browser)
  ctrl + alt + c          chromium (browser)
  ctrl + alt + g          chromium (browser)
  ctrl + alt + o          opera (browser)
  ctrl + alt + d          obs
  ctrl + alt + e          archlinux-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + a          alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + q          alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + s          fish-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + z          fastfetch-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + w          fastfetch-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + p          pamac-manager
  ctrl + alt + i          kiro-iso-builder
  ctrl + alt + m          mintstick -m iso
  ctrl + alt + ,          mintstick -m iso
  ctrl + shift + Escape   xfce4-taskmanager
  alt + F2                xfce4-appfinder (collapsed)
  alt + F3                xfce4-appfinder
  super + v               pavucontrol
  ctrl + alt + u          pavucontrol
  super + alt + space     ohmychadwm rofi menu
  alt + t                 variety: trash wallpaper
  alt + n                 variety: next wallpaper
  alt + p                 variety: previous wallpaper
  alt + f                 variety: favorite wallpaper
  alt + Left              variety: previous wallpaper
  alt + Right             variety: next wallpaper
  alt + Up                variety: toggle pause
  alt + Down              variety: resume
  super + ctrl + space    variety: wallpaper selector
  alt + shift + t         variety trash + pywal recolor
  alt + shift + n         variety next + pywal recolor
  alt + shift + p         variety previous + pywal recolor
  alt + shift + f         variety favorite + pywal recolor
  alt + shift + u         pywal recolor from current wallpaper

── 2. Window Management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + q               close focused window
  super + shift + q       close focused window
  super + shift + c       close focused window
  super + ctrl + q        kill all windows
  super + f               toggle fullscreen
  super + shift + j       move window down in stack
  super + shift + k       move window up in stack
  super + ctrl + j        rotate stack forward
  super + ctrl + k        rotate stack backward
  super + ctrl + shift + Return  promote window to master (zoom)
  super + ctrl + w        toggle tab mode
  super + alt + o         increase window opacity
  super + alt + shift + o  decrease window opacity
  super + Mouse1 (drag)   move / place window
  super + Mouse2          toggle floating
  super + Mouse3 (drag)   adjust master/stack ratio
  super + shift + Mouse3  resize window
  Mouse3 on desktop       open ohmychadwm menu

── 3. Workspaces / Tags / Groups ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + 1..9            switch to tag 1–9
  super + shift + 1..9    send window to tag 1–9
  super + ctrl + 1..9     toggle tag 1–9 in view
  super + ctrl + shift + 1..9  toggle tag 1–9 on window
  super + 0               view all tags
  super + shift + 0       send window to all tags
  super + Tab             toggle to previous tag
  super + Left            view previous tag
  super + Right           view next tag

── 4. Layout & Tiling ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + ctrl + F1..F12  select layout 1–12 (dwindle..cfloat)
  super + ctrl + m        cycle to next layout
  super + ctrl + p        cycle to previous layout
  super + h               shrink master area
  super + l               grow master area
  super + shift + h       grow focused window (cfact)
  super + shift + l       shrink focused window (cfact)
  super + shift + o       reset window size factor (cfact)
  super + i               increase master count (nmaster)
  super + n               decrease master count (nmaster)
  super + ctrl + t        toggle gaps on/off
  super + ctrl + i        increase all gaps
  super + ctrl + d        decrease all gaps
  super + shift + i       increase inner gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + i  decrease inner gaps
  super + ctrl + o        increase outer gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + o  decrease outer gaps
  super + ctrl + 6        increase inner horizontal gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + 6  decrease inner horizontal gaps
  super + ctrl + 7        increase inner vertical gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + 7  decrease inner vertical gaps
  super + ctrl + 8        increase outer horizontal gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + 8  decrease outer horizontal gaps
  super + ctrl + 9        increase outer vertical gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + 9  decrease outer vertical gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + d  reset gaps to default
  super + shift + minus   decrease border width
  super + shift + p       increase border width
  super + shift + w       reset border to default width

── 5. Multi-monitor ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + comma           focus previous monitor
  super + period          focus next monitor
  super + shift + Left    send window to previous monitor
  super + shift + Right   send window to next monitor

── 6. Multimedia & Hardware ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  XF86AudioRaiseVolume    raise volume
  XF86AudioLowerVolume    lower volume
  XF86AudioMute           toggle mute
  XF86AudioPlay           play / pause (playerctl)
  XF86AudioNext           next track (playerctl)
  XF86AudioPrev           previous track (playerctl)
  XF86AudioStop           stop (playerctl)
  XF86MonBrightnessUp     increase screen brightness
  XF86MonBrightnessDown   decrease screen brightness

── 7. Screenshots ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + u               region screenshot to clipboard (maim)
  super + ctrl + u        fullscreen screenshot to clipboard (maim)
  Print                   full screenshot to Pictures (scrot)
  ctrl + Print            xfce4-screenshooter
  ctrl + shift + Print    gnome-screenshot (interactive)
  ctrl + super + Print    flameshot gui

── 8. System & Session ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + x               archlinux-logout
  ctrl + alt + k          archlinux-logout
  ctrl + alt + l          archlinux-logout --settings
  ctrl + alt + r          archlinux-betterlockscreen (lock screen)
  super + shift + x       edu-powermenu
  super + Escape          ohmychadwm system menu
  alt + x                 ohmychadwm system menu
  alt + shift + x         ohmychadwm system menu
  super + ctrl + s        kiro-keybindings (show this cheatsheet)
  super + b               toggle bar
  super + shift + space   toggle bar
  super + g               toggle compositor (fastcompmgr)
  super + p               toggle compositor (picom)
  super + shift + s       reload sxhkd
  super + shift + r       restart ohmychadwm
  super + ctrl + shift + r  rebuild ohmychadwm
  super + shift + Escape  xkill (force-kill a window)
  ctrl + alt + Delete     kill all windows
  ctrl + alt + shift + Delete  quit ohmychadwm
